D12 PsychologyL2 UnderstandReference

Brand Recall by Colour — Coca-Cola Red, Tiffany Blue

Colour drives 80% of brand recognition (Loyola Marymount 2006); brands trademark-protect specific shades — Tiffany Blue (PMS 1837), UPS Brown, T-Mobile Magenta

Recall tests show colour outperforms typography in instant brand recognition. Owens-Singer (2006) reported 87% increase in recall accuracy when brand colour is correct. Several brands hold "colour trademarks": Pantone 1837 (Tiffany & Co), Pantone 219 (T-Mobile Magenta), UPS Pullman Brown.

Slide hue offset to see brand-match accuracy drop.
